name: Stir-Fried Broccoli and Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1 small Onion, cut into thin wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add broccoli, mushrooms, salt, and pepper; continue stir-frying for 5 minutes, or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
